since_last: 66% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.73%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -2.47% · Gold -2.04% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 66% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.73%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.73%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.66%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: EQIX is the standout at -9.94%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.17%, MRVL +5.75%, NXPI +4.96%, LRCX +4.77%, CEVA +4.65%. Laggards: EQIX -9.94%, IBM -3.56%, SPCX -2.05%, SAP -1.82%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.05% at $187.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
